Perf Check: LCP < 2.5s; CLS < 0.1; INP < 200ms; no render-blocking JS; bundle < 300KB
SEO Check: Title unique; H1 present; OG tags complete; WebSite+Organization schema; canonical self-ref
A11y Check: Skip-nav link; contrast 4.5:1; ARIA landmarks; keyboard nav; hero text readable on mobile
Security Check: CSP headers set; newsletter CSRF token; affiliate links rel=noopener; no API keys in DOM
Content Check: Tagline 'Design. Print. Earn.' exact; CTAs clear; brand colors #039BE5/#E65100; no placeholder text
Functional Check: Newsletter submits; WhatsApp href correct; all nav links work; /go/ tracking fires; ChatBot opens
Notes: Most critical page — test on real mobile device first; verify /go/ click fires before redirect
